narrative:
Porter Township has 6,164 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.3 percentage points.
